inline_comments.message:
$ docker pull registry-dev.nso.lab-services.ca/nso-image/multi-tenancy-test-suite:latest
Error response from daemon: Get https://registry-dev.nso.lab-services.ca/v2/: net/http: request canceled while waiting for connection (Client.Timeout exceeded while awaiting headers)

I believe images available in Onap's Nexus should be used or images publicly available at least.

Note that this is *test-suite* docker image. Are you intending to introduce your scala/gatling tests as a separate docker container and run the tests from there? This complicates things somewhat.

Also, regardless of the above, this is all still happening in the wrong repository.
It is better for us to include our tests in here, but how we could do that? This repo based on Robot framework, but our tests are in Scala Using Gatling framework and it is maven based.
